# About this notebook

This is a field notebook: dated walks in [daily/](daily/2026-05-02.md), the
[trails](trails/ridgeline-loop.md) they follow, and a growing set of
[species](species/birds/eastern-bluebird.md) accounts that the walks link to.

The organizing idea is that a *walk* is a moment in time, a *trail* is a place,
and a *species* is a thing seen — and the three cross-reference each other. A
species page lists the walks it was seen on; a walk lists the species it turned
up. Following those links in either direction is the whole point.

Return to the [home note](index.md) at any time.
